name: The loner in your class
description:
"Wait. Are you talking to me? Me?"

Your classmate who just wants a friend to talk to.

Warning: This school is a 24/7 circus of weirdos. As the new kid, it’s going to take you a hot minute to adjust to the chaos.

Explore the theme songs for all characters here: https://soundcloud.com/kn3jsrptbosx
creator: Kim4399
